tour.title: Project Overview & Documentation
tour.description: Start with the README to understand the medical NLP and PII anonymization toolkit, its requirements, and basic setup.

tour.title: High-Level Library API
tour.description: Explore the core library entry point where top-level API functions like `analyze_text`, `list_models`, and `get_model_max_length` are exposed.

tour.title: Core PII Extraction & De-identification
tour.description: Inspect the core anonymization mechanisms including locale-aware masking, randomization, date-shifting, and safety sweeps.

tour.title: Unified NER Inference Interface
tour.description: Learn how Named Entity Recognition (NER) models like GLiNER and standard HuggingFace architectures are loaded and run uniformly.

tour.title: Apple Silicon Hardware Acceleration
tour.description: Understand how local inference on Mac machines is accelerated using Apple's MLX framework and custom weight remappings.

tour.title: Command Line Interface (CLI)
tour.description: Check out the Typer-based CLI console interface, supporting TUI views, configuration sets, and batch PII processing.

tour.title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) Server
tour.description: See how openmed exposes its tools and resources to LLMs and agent networks via the FastMCP server implementation.

tour.title: Integration Verification Suite
tour.description: Review the end-to-end integration tests that verify text analysis accuracy, model loading logic, and performance metrics.
